vocab.meaning: đi về phía, hướng về phía
vocab.example: Whenever I have a long weekend, I usually head for the coast to enjoy the fresh sea air.
One of the best things about hiking is when you stumble upon a hidden waterfall deep in the mountains.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng sự ấm áp hoặc vẻ đẹp (thường là ánh nắng)
vocab.example: There's nothing more relaxing than lying on the beach and basking in the golden afternoon sunshine.
I spent the entire morning sitting on the balcony just taking in the breathtaking views of the mountain range.

vocab.meaning: ban phát, đưa ra (ở đây dùng ẩn dụ cho việc thiên nhiên mang lại cảm giác)
vocab.example: The sea seems to dole out a sense of tranquility that you just can't find in the hustle and bustle of the city.

vocab.meaning: chặn lại, che khuất (âm thanh hoặc ánh sáng)
vocab.example: I prefer the mountains because the dense forests block out all the noise from the outside world.

vocab.meaning: tìm kiếm (thường dùng cho việc tìm kiếm sự yên bình hoặc trải nghiệm)
vocab.example: I’m constantly trolling for secluded beaches where I can read my book without any interruptions.

vocab.meaning: mở ra (một không gian hoặc tầm nhìn rộng lớn)
vocab.example: As you reach the summit, the landscape suddenly opens up, revealing a spectacular vista of the valley below.

vocab.meaning: thiu thiu ngủ, chìm vào giấc ngủ (nhẹ nhàng)
vocab.example: The sound of the waves crashing against the shore always helps me drift off into a peaceful nap.

vocab.meaning: hấp thụ, tận hưởng trọn vẹn (không khí, rung cảm)
vocab.example: I love to wander through mountain villages and soak up the local culture and the serene atmosphere.
